testcase.name: RPS smart contract > initial ledger state > starts in waiting state with no players joined
RPS smart contract > who_wins() — all 9 move combinations > rock vs rock → draw
RPS smart contract > who_wins() — all 9 move combinations > rock vs paper → player2_wins
RPS smart contract > who_wins() — all 9 move combinations > rock vs scissors → player1_wins
RPS smart contract > who_wins() — all 9 move combinations > paper vs rock → player1_wins
RPS smart contract > who_wins() — all 9 move combinations > paper vs paper → draw
RPS smart contract > who_wins() — all 9 move combinations > paper vs scissors → player2_wins
RPS smart contract > who_wins() — all 9 move combinations > scissors vs rock → player2_wins
RPS smart contract > who_wins() — all 9 move combinations > scissors vs paper → player1_wins
RPS smart contract > who_wins() — all 9 move combinations > scissors vs scissors → draw
RPS smart contract > make_commit() — commitment binding and hiding > binding: same move + same salt → identical commitment hash
RPS smart contract > make_commit() — commitment binding and hiding > hiding: same move + different salt → different commitment hash
RPS smart contract > make_commit() — commitment binding and hiding > hiding: different moves + same salt → different commitment hash
RPS smart contract > double-commit rejection (Req 1.4) > no commit is accepted after both players are committed (P1 tries)
RPS smart contract > double-commit rejection (Req 1.4) > no commit is accepted after both players are committed (P2 tries)
RPS smart contract > double-reveal rejection (Req 2.5) > P1 cannot reveal a second time
RPS smart contract > double-reveal rejection (Req 2.5) > P2 cannot reveal after game is over
RPS smart contract > full game state progression > state transitions: waiting → committed → finished
